title: U.S. issues sweeping Iran oil sanctions waivers, unlocking billions in revenue for Tehran
summary_full: The U.S. issued a sweeping rollback of sanctions on Iranian oil, offering Tehran an economic lifeline as negotiations toward a peace deal proceed.
summary_public: The U.S. issued a sweeping rollback of sanctions on Iranian oil, offering Tehran an economic lifeline as negotiations toward a peace deal proceed.
